blended.narrative: Shanty Creek is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 19 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 795 ft. Looking ahead, 30 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
